dependencyDecision: Use the newest stable Axios release returned by axios@latest, exact-pin it, select the XHR adapter explicitly, and retain pnpm as the sole package manager.

nativeFetchAudit.before: src/api/client.ts was the sole approved native fetch owner.
nativeFetchAudit.after: No authored production browser source calls native fetch; the scanner allowlist is empty.

XMLHttpRequestAudit.after: No authored production browser source directly uses XMLHttpRequest; Axios owns the selected XHR adapter internally.

directAxiosImportAudit.negativeProbe: PASS: an external probe was rejected by ARCH_RAW_HTTP_CLIENT.

behavior: rejects traversal, malformed encoding, protocol-relative paths, backslashes, control characters, and dynamic bases
reads the current session only for session or session-required requests
removes project-owned metadata before the adapter
ejects the interceptor during Vite hot-module disposal
maps transport failures to sanitized ApiClientError values
does not expose request configuration, headers, credentials, payloads, or stacks
ejects the interceptor during Vite hot-module disposal

cancellationBehavior.signalOwner: existing Vue Query consumers and replay loader

errorMapping.upstreamMessageSanitization: control characters removed; length capped; sensitive-field vocabulary rejected

ZodBoundaryImpact: Transport-level unknown JSON validation remains in requestJson; endpoint schemas, envelopes, DTO validation, and domain mapping remain in existing auth and product mapper boundaries.
VueQueryImpact: TanStack Vue Query remains the server-state owner and continues to call typed product API functions with its AbortSignal; no store or view imports Axios.
proxyRewrite: Remove only the leading /api/ksl prefix; /api/ksl/liveproxy/GetActList becomes /liveproxy/GetActList upstream.
proxySecurity: Fixed HTTPS target, TLS verification enabled, no wildcard target, no generic /CALL, no proxyRequest, no credential or body logger.
productionHostingBoundary: Vite proxy behavior is development-only. Production hosting must provide the same restricted same-origin /api/ksl route or set an approved browser-readable HTTPS VITE_KSL_CHESS_API_BASE.

changedConsumers.src/api/productApi.ts: protected replay declares session-required and no longer reads auth persistence directly
changedConsumers.VueQueryProductViews: unchanged typed product API ownership and cancellation
changedConsumers.useRemoteReplayLoader: unchanged explicit cancellation and route replacement behavior

scannerImpact.negativeProbe: PASS for raw Axios, fetch, and XMLHttpRequest findings

typecheck: PASS: mise exec -- pnpm run typecheck
build: PASS: mise exec -- pnpm exec vite build --outDir /tmp/chess-pgnviewer-vue-p1g1-final-build; 3139 modules transformed; repository dist remained absent.

localDevelopmentBrowserValidation.proxyRequest: PASS: POST /api/ksl/liveproxy/GetActList returned a real production response.
localDevelopmentBrowserValidation.workspace: PASS: nonblank board-centric workspace, no Vite overlay or console-breaking error.
localDevelopmentBrowserValidation.competitions: PASS: 20 production rows and 周末Q赛 filter interaction.
localDevelopmentBrowserValidation.competitionDetail: PASS: real groups, rounds, and two pairings for competition 47347, including rapid replacement.
localDevelopmentBrowserValidation.compatibility: PASS: sanitized handoff and truthful unavailable state.
localDevelopmentBrowserValidation.invalidLogin: PASS: deliberately invalid non-secret credentials produced the expected rejected state and cleared the password.
localDevelopmentBrowserValidation.permissionUnavailableTimeoutCancellation: PASS through external restricted validation proxies; no overlay or console-breaking error.

productionBundleValidation.hosting: temporary production build behind an external restricted same-origin /api/ksl proxy
productionBundleValidation.apiRequests: five same-origin production API requests observed as XHR, all HTTP 200

realApiValidation: PASS: real GetActList, GetActDetail, GetActGroups, GetMatchRoundlist, and GetMatchPairlist responses flowed through same-origin /api/ksl XHR requests.
governanceCommitPlan: Commit this report and the three governance indexes with subject: docs(governance): 记录 Axios 请求层与开发代理验收证据
warnings: Successful owner-account login and authenticated protected replay were not validated because owner credentials were unavailable.
Production hosting must provide the restricted same-origin /api/ksl route or an approved browser-readable HTTPS API base; the Vite proxy is not a production server.
